name: Florida Key Lime Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the crust: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). In a pie plate measuring 9 inches, combine graham cracker crumbs and 2 tablespoons sugar; stir in butter until blended. Press mixture firmly and evenly over bottom and sides of pie plate. Bake for 10 minutes until browned. Cool completely on a wire rack.
2. Prepare the filling: In the top of a double boiler using a wire whisk, beat egg yolks, lime juice, 1/3 cup sugar, and salt until well blended. Set over simmering water and cook about 5 minutes, stirring constantly until the mixture is thick enough to coat the back of a metal spoon. Remove from heat; stir in 1 tablespoon grated lime peel. Refrigerate mixture for about 45 minutes until cool.
3. Assemble the pie: In a large bowl with an electric mixer set to medium speed, beat cream until soft peaks form. Set aside 1 cup whipped cream for garnish and fold into the remaining cream cooled from step 2. Spoon filling into prepared crust and refrigerate at least 2 hours until set.
4. To serve: Decoratively spoon remaining whipped cream over top of pie; sprinkle with remaining 1 tablespoon grated lime peel. Garnish with lime slices, if desired.
